subject: A massive wolf with glowing green eyes faces off against an armored warrior in a forest clearing; the wolf is titanic in scale relative to the human
description: A colossal wolf — its fur dark with a mane around its face, eyes glowing a vivid green — rears up or confronts the viewer from the left side of the composition. Its mouth is open showing teeth. To the right, a smaller armored humanoid figure stands holding a sword, viewed from behind and slightly below, giving a sense of perspective that makes the wolf look enormous by comparison. The setting is a forest with trees visible behind both figures. The sky is clear blue. The mood is tense confrontation — the warrior is clearly overmatched in size but stands their ground.
foreground: armored warrior holding sword, viewed from behind; massive glowing-eyed wolf looming
emotion: tension and confrontation; warrior stands against overwhelming size
